description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/meta.json, trimming the 74-character title to 60 characters and the 190-character description to 145 characters, both while preserving the core meaning. check_meta.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_meta.py: 2 violations - title is 74 chars (limit 60), description is 190 chars (limit 160). Trimming the title by cutting filler words while keeping the core promise, and rewriting the description as a shorter sentence that keeps the same four concepts. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_meta.py now exits 0 (title 60 chars, description 145 chars). bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
